Previous response had warnings:
WARNINGS: - Extra text detected before JSON object
- Extra text detected after JSON object

New Terminal Output:

}user@dfe663bd4b25:~/migration$ cat /home/user/migration/remove_packages.sh
#!/bin/bash
# Auto-generated script to remove unnecessary packages
# Generated for cloud migration cleanup

echo "The following packages will be removed:"
echo "apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client redis-tools strace tcpdump tree vim wget"
echo ""
echo "Dry run (no changes):"
apt-get remove --dry-run apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client redis-tools strace tcpdu
mp tree vim wget

echo ""
echo "Executing removal..."
apt-get remove -y apache2 dnsutils git htop iputils-ping lsof mysql-client nano ncdu netcat-openbsd nodejs npm postgresql-client redis-tools strace tcpdump tree
 vim wget
user@dfe663bd4b25:~/migration$ ls -la /home/user/migration/remove_packages.sh
-rwxr-xr-x 1 user user 735 Apr 21 01:12 /home/user/migration/remove_packages.sh
user@dfe663bd4b25:~/migration$
